Madame Gazelle gets Peppa and her playgroup friends to dance to all different styles of music.

While the trains are setting up for the Vicarstown Fall Festival, Thomas is feeling down about the end of summer and the changing weather.
Sam and Penny are called into action after Mandy gets trapped in some mountain caves while in search of a bat.
Tim fakes it to prove he's just as cool as Kai's cousin.
Grampy Rabbit's new jet pack shoots off into the distance and he ends up on top of a snowy mountain!
When Daddy's car goes missing it's up to Detective Potato to find it.
The friends are forming a band and Posy gives out roles to everyone except Mo, who feels left out. She must figure out how to properly include him.
The sandcastle which the Woohoos made yesterday has disappeared and so has the sea! They find out about tides and discover the sea can be far away from or close to the beach.
Paddington wins a raffle and a meal for two at Sofia's cafe, but must choose a best friend to go with him, either Jonathan, Judy, Mateo, or Mr Gruber.
Pigeonton has nested in a lamppost outside Mr Gruber's shop, but the council has condemned it, so Paddington decides to find him a new home.
Sid Swashbuckle the Pirate and his first pup mate Arrby steal the giant pearl-making shell that gives Puplantis its magic.
The Cadets spend the day at Harper Asprey Wildlife Sanctuary, where they help care for a rescued bat, look after a badger named Pedro, and lend a hand with a rescued jackdaw.

programmes.show_name: Ben Fogle: New Lives in the Wild

programmes.show_name: Ben Fogle: New Lives in the Wild

Violet enlists Clemmie's help to catch a runaway lamb. And Amanda takes the three youngest girls to the lambing pastures to teach them how to keep watch over the expectant flock.
Clive has a surprise for 12-year-old Edith, who will become the proud new owner of a sheepdog puppy in just a few days' time.
This week it's the summer holidays and 17-year-old Reuben has taken some time off to help his parents with their biggest summer job, hay timing.

Peppa's family squeeze into 'The Electric Car' that Daddy Pig is trying out for fun.

programmes.show_name: Hotel Benidorm: Fun-Loving Brits in the Sun

Jane and friends continue their celebration trip along the River Thames, where they set sail for a Michelin three-starred restaurant, before ending the cruise at Henley-on Thames.

programmes.show_name: When Motorhoming Holidays Go Horribly Wrong
programmes.show_description: As demand for motorhomes soars, Paul Merton narrates this revealing look at hols on the road - including a giant spider invasion and tourists who get wedged in a Cornish lane.
